name: Edesa Biotech, Inc.
business: Edesa Biotech is a biopharmaceutical company developing drug candidates for inflammatory and immune-related diseases, focusing on Medical Dermatology and Respiratory. Its pipeline includes EB06 for vitiligo, EB01 for allergic contact dermatitis (partnering stage), and EB05 (paridiprubart) for acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS). The company targets patients with unmet medical needs in large markets such as vitiligo and ARDS.
sellsTo: patients with acute respiratory distress syndrome

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company developing innovative ways to treat inflammatory and immune-related diseases.

catalysts.event: Initiate enrollment for EB06 Phase 2 study in vitiligo
catalysts.sentence: Subject to regulatory approval, we anticipate initiating recruitment by midyear 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Vitiligo prevalence is between 0.5 to 2% of the global population.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that vitiligo prevalence is between 0.5 to 2% of the global population.

tamClaims.claim: ARDS accounts for 10% of ICU admissions, >3 million patients globally per year.
tamClaims.sentence: ARDS has historically accounted for 10% of ICU admissions, representing more than 3 million patients globally each year.

tamClaims.claim: There are up to 600,000 ARDS-related ICU admissions annually in seven major markets and Canada.
tamClaims.sentence: we estimate that there are as many as 600,000 ARDS-related admissions to ICUs each year in the seven major markets (U.S, UK, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Japan) and Canada.

tamClaims.claim: Allergic contact dermatitis and irritant contact dermatitis cost up to $2 billion annually in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on market research, we believe that together these conditions cost up to $2 billion annually in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: There are up to 30 million people in seven major markets and Canada with ACD.
tamClaims.sentence: we estimate that there are as many as 30 million people in the seven major markets (US, UK, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Japan) and Canada with ACD

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable patient population for EB01 is up to 5 million in seven major markets and Canada.
tamClaims.sentence: we believe that the total addressable patient population for EB01 is as high as five million people in the seven major markets and Canada.
